Name: Slacker
Bonus Objective: Game ends without you completing 5 missions

Name: Misdirector
Bonus Objective: Lanes you don't control is overrun 3 times, you cannot lose your lane between these losses

Name: Butcher
Bonus Objective: Game ends without you Healing more than 30 HP on units at medbay

Name: Trojan
Bonus Objective: Lose 5 progress over course of game

Name: Usurper
Bonus Objective: Steal Command from higher Rank 3 times

Name: Ghost
Bonus Objective: Be lowest rank at end of game

Name: Adventurer
Bonus Objective: Game ends with you completing 6 missions

Name: The Wall
Bonus Objective: Do not let your lane overrun

Name: Medic
Bonus Objective: Game ends with you Healing more than 30 HP on units at medbay

Name: Stubborn
Bonus Objective: Do not lose more than 5 progress over course of game

Name: Conductor
Bonus Objective: Take Command from Lower Rank 5 times

Name: High Command
Bonus Objective: Be highest rank at end of game

Name: Decorated
Bonus Objective: Complete game at 5 rank or higher

Name: Middleman
Bonus Objective: Do not be highest or lowest rank in group

Name: Hunter
Bonus Objective: Kill enemies with active abilities or items

Name: Minimalist
Bonus Objective: End game with 3 empty upgrade slots

Name: Deus Machina
Bonus Objective: When the team would lose the game, instead set progress to what it was before this round, reduce enemy progress by 1 and your objective is now complete

Name: AFK
Bonus Objective: Do not add units or equipment to any lane for any 3 rounds (does not need to be consecutive)

Name: Leroy
Bonus Objective: Go into a round with only 1 unit in lane

Name: Kremlen
Bonus Objective: Spend more from Command than your own resource
